code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut i = 0
mut in_num = false
mut sign = 1
mut value = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if in_num
      sum = sum + sign * value
      count = count + 1
      in_num = false
      sign = 1
      value = 0
    end
  else
    if not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = 1
      value = 0
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
      else if b == 43
        sign = 1
      else
        value = b - 48
      end
    else
      value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  sum = sum + sign * value
  count = count + 1
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
